# GitHub Copilot Chat Modes

This folder is intentionally scaffolded with guidance only.

You can add custom chat modes here as:

- `.github/chatmodes/*.chatmode.md`

## What Chat Modes Are For

Use chat modes to create repeatable Copilot workflows, such as:

- implementation planning
- test-writing and test hardening
- code review and risk triage
- refactor assistance with project-specific constraints

## How To Start

1. Read the official GitHub docs for custom chat modes.
2. Create your first mode file (for example: `review.chatmode.md`).
3. Commit modes that should be shared with the team.

## Official Sources

- https://docs.github.com/copilot/customizing-copilot/creating-custom-chat-modes-for-github-copilot
- https://docs.github.com/en/copilot/how-tos/configure-custom-instructions/add-repository-custom-instructions
